summary: Comprehensive testing of Newsletter Builder feature - all backend APIs (15/15 tests passed) and all frontend features working correctly

passed: GET /api/newsletter-builder/issues - Returns list of issues
GET /api/newsletter-builder/issues?status=draft - Filter by status works
POST /api/newsletter-builder/issues - Create new newsletter (returns 200)
GET /api/newsletter-builder/issues/{id} - Get single issue works
GET /api/newsletter-builder/issues/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent
PUT /api/newsletter-builder/issues/{id} - Update existing issue works
PUT /api/newsletter-builder/issues/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent
POST /api/newsletter-builder/issues/{id}/preview - Generates HTML preview
POST /api/newsletter-builder/issues/{id}/preview - Returns 404 for non-existent
GET /api/newsletter-builder/segments - Returns audience segments with counts
POST /api/newsletter-builder/issues/{id}/send - Test email functionality works
POST /api/newsletter-builder/issues/{id}/send - Returns 404 for non-existent
POST /api/newsletter-builder/issues - All 3 block types (main_story, image_text, simple_text) work
DELETE /api/newsletter-builder/issues/{id} - Delete issue works
DELETE /api/newsletter-builder/issues/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent
Newsletter Builder list view shows drafts with correct status badges (DRAFT badge visible)
Create Newsletter modal opens with three tabs: Basics, Content, Settings
Basics tab has: Internal Title, Email Subject, Preheader, Issue Label, Date Label, Header Image, Hero Section fields
Content tab has three Add Block buttons: Main Story, Image + Text Card, Text Block
Can add Main Story block with: Image, Eyebrow, Headline, Body, CTA fields
Can add Image + Text Card block with: Image, Title, Body, Link fields
Can add Text Block with: Headline, Body fields
Block reordering works (Move Up/Move Down buttons)
Blocks show with numbered labels (Block 1, Block 2, etc)
Delete block button works
Settings tab shows Audience Segment dropdown with subscriber counts
Settings tab shows 'Show Request Studio Access CTA block' checkbox
Settings tab shows Send Test Email input and Send Test button
Save Draft button creates newsletter issue in database
Preview button generates and displays rendered HTML in modal
Preview shows: Header image, Hero section, Content blocks, Footer with social links
Send Campaign button visible for saved issues
Newsletter issues can be deleted from the list (confirm dialog shown)

block_types.main_story: Full form with Image, Image Alt, Eyebrow, Headline, Body, CTA Button Text, CTA URL, CTA Microcopy
block_types.image_text: Full form with Image, Image Alt, Title, Body, Link Text, Link URL

newsletter_preview.header: Shadow Wolves Productions logo and branding
newsletter_preview.hero_section: Welcome to The Den with intro text and chips
newsletter_preview.content_blocks: Main Story block with headline, body, and CTA button
newsletter_preview.footer: Instagram, YouTube, IMDb links + Unsubscribe link

seed_data_creation: Test newsletter issue pre-created by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Newsletter Builder feature fully tested. Navigation path: Admin > STUDIO > COMMS > Newsletters. All CRUD operations work. Block editor supports 3 block types with reordering. Preview generates proper HTML email. Test email sending via Resend API configured and working.
